summary: Iteration 7 testing completed successfully. All requested features verified: 1) /admin/deadlines page with list-based deadlines, 2) Form with recurring options (frequenza: mensile/trimestrale/annuale, data fine), 3) Multiple list selection with checkboxes (FIXED - was crashing due to infinite loop), 4) 'Invia Promemoria Ora' button, 5) API POST /api/deadlines with list_ids and is_recurring, 6) API POST /api/deadlines/send-reminders, 7) ClientDetail deadline form with recurring options. Backend: 9/9 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows working after bug fix.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED - Checkbox causing infinite loop (Maximum update depth exceeded) when clicking on list items
ui_bugs.selector: Checkbox component with onCheckedChange + parent div onClick
ui_bugs.resolution: Replaced Checkbox component with custom checkbox div to avoid event bubbling issues

passed_tests: ✅ API Health Check - Fiscal Tax Canarie API accessible
✅ GET /api/client-lists - Returns lists with client_count
✅ POST /api/deadlines with list_ids - Deadline assigned to lists
✅ POST /api/deadlines with is_recurring=true (mensile) - next_occurrence calculated (+1 month)
✅ POST /api/deadlines with is_recurring=true (trimestrale) - next_occurrence calculated (+3 months)
✅ POST /api/deadlines with is_recurring=true (annuale) - next_occurrence calculated (+1 year)
✅ POST /api/deadlines/send-reminders - Batch reminder endpoint works
✅ GET /api/deadlines - Returns deadlines with list_ids, is_recurring, reminder_days fields
✅ DeadlineResponse model has all 16+ required fields
✅ Frontend: /admin/deadlines page loads correctly
✅ Frontend: 'Scadenze per Liste' title and subtitle visible
✅ Frontend: 'Invia Promemoria Ora' button visible and clickable
✅ Frontend: Form fields (Titolo, Data Scadenza, Descrizione, Categoria, Priorità)
✅ Frontend: 'Seleziona Liste Clienti' section with checkboxes
✅ Frontend: List selection works without crash (after fix)
✅ Frontend: Multiple list selection works
✅ Frontend: 'Scadenza ricorrente' switch enables recurring options
✅ Frontend: 'Frequenza' dropdown (Mensile/Trimestrale/Annuale) visible when recurring enabled
✅ Frontend: 'Data fine (opzionale)' date field visible when recurring enabled
✅ Frontend: 'Promemoria automatici' switch
✅ Frontend: 'Invia notifica email immediata' switch
✅ Frontend: 'Scadenze Assegnate a Liste' section shows existing deadlines
✅ Frontend: Existing deadlines show 'trimestrale' badge for recurring
✅ Frontend: ClientDetail - 'Scadenze' tab accessible
✅ Frontend: ClientDetail - 'Scadenza ricorrente' switch (id=is-recurring)
✅ Frontend: ClientDetail - 'Frequenza' field when recurring enabled
✅ Frontend: ClientDetail - 'Data fine ricorrenza (opzionale)' field
✅ Frontend: ClientDetail - 'Promemoria automatici' switch (id=send-reminders)
✅ Frontend: ClientDetail - 'Invia notifica email immediata al cliente' switch (id=send-notification)
✅ Frontend: ClientDetail - 'Crea Scadenza Ricorrente' button when recurring enabled
critical_code_review_comments: DeadlinesManagement.jsx - Replaced Checkbox component with custom styled div checkbox to fix infinite loop bug caused by event propagation between Checkbox onCheckedChange and parent div onClick handlers
seed_data_creation: Created test deadlines during API tests (prefixed with TEST_) - cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 7 features tested and working. /admin/deadlines page allows creating deadlines assigned to client lists with recurring options (mensile/trimestrale/annuale) and automatic reminders (7,3,1,0 days before). 'Invia Promemoria Ora' button triggers batch reminder sending. ClientDetail page has equivalent deadline form with recurring options. next_occurrence field is auto-calculated based on recurrence_type. Bug was found and fixed: Checkbox component in list selection was causing infinite loop - replaced with custom checkbox div.

admin_deadlines_page.title: Scadenze per Liste
features: List selection with checkboxes (2 lists: Autonomi, Società)
Automatic reminders (7, 3, 1 giorni prima e giorno stesso)
'Invia Promemoria Ora' button for manual batch sending
Display existing deadlines assigned to lists
list_ids: Array of list IDs to assign deadline
recurrence_end_date: Optional end date for recurrence
send_reminders: Boolean to enable automatic reminders
reminder_days: Array of days before deadline [7,3,1,0]
Data fine ricorrenza date field when recurring
Button changes to 'Crea Scadenza Ricorrente' when recurring enabled

bug_fixed.issue: Maximum update depth exceeded error when clicking list checkboxes in DeadlinesManagement.jsx
bug_fixed.root_cause: Checkbox component's onCheckedChange was firing alongside the parent div's onClick, both calling toggleListSelection, causing infinite re-renders
bug_fixed.solution: Replaced Shadcn Checkbox component with custom styled div that acts as a checkbox, avoiding the component's internal state management conflicts
